programmes.show_description: The Persuaders discover a crashed plane containing a dead scientist and a formula he's written down. The Persuaders must find who the formula belongs to - and the murderer.
The Avengers latest case sees them enter the world of ceramics when industry executives are mysteriously killed. Can Steed and Peel unearth the truth? Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
The Avengers attempt to track down criminals who have mysteriously vanished. Is the case linked to the deaths of secret agents and a Tudor mansion? Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.

Western starring Sterling Hayden. After the Civil War a rancher is wrongfully imprisoned in a notorious desert prison. When a deadly plague threatens to overwhelm the jail, can he help stop it? (1952)
A car crash leaves people trapped inside their vehicles, a bushwalker is snowed-in and trapped inside a hiker's hut, and a young man is left unconscious when he is hit by a giant wave.

With the mayor demanding action against outlaw Frank Masters, Clay Hollister searches the county for him .
When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.
Blue finds a job scouting for a man and adopted Apache daughter who are there on government orders to make peace with Cochise.
Blue and the men decide they can win the $300 needed for a new saddle at the Fourth of July rodeo. When only John wins, it is left to Blue filling in at a prize fight for the boxer he hurt.

After Sam Brewster's son gets shot in self defence by Deputy Charlie, only Curly Bill Brocius decides to stand with the sheriff when they meet Brewster's men at the outskirts of town .
A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago. Randall tags along with an overeager bounty hunter to ensure the man is brought back alive.
